title: [CI:DOCS] Explicitly mention that checkpointing systemd containers might fail

comments.body:
LGTM

@adrianreber can you please add [CI:DOCS] to the commit title so our ci knows that this is only a docs change.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *adrianreber*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
